falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if (i) Eonia/ESTR tracked DFR within 10 bp on average through 2014-2022, (ii) at least one of {DE 2y, NL 2y, FR 2y, FI 2y} sovereign yield went below zero for at least 24 cumulative months, AND (iii) aggregate eurozone household deposits grew within 2 pp/year of the 2010-2013 trend during 2014-2022. PARTIAL if 2 of 3 conditions hold. REFUTED if any of (i) or (iii) fails by a large margin (e.g. deposit run-down > 5% annualised) or if no core sovereign yield went negative.
